name: inngest
description: Official Inngest plugin for Codex: skills and MCP wiring for durable functions, event-driven workflows, flow control, middleware, and realtime updates.

interface.shortDescription: Build durable functions and event-driven workflows with Inngest.
interface.longDescription: Inngest teaches Codex how to add, debug, and evolve TypeScript durable functions, event schemas, step-based workflows, flow-control policies, middleware, and realtime UI updates. It also wires Codex to the local Inngest dev server MCP endpoint when available.
defaultPrompt: Add Inngest to this TypeScript project.
Stream workflow updates to a React UI.
